book_title: GOSPEL OF GOD - IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA
author: ABASID 1841

verses.title: THE DWELLING OF GOD
verses.content: In the beginning, God chose to dwell among humanity, not in stone alone, but in living vessels. And this dwelling was called SHEKINAH, the visible presence of the Living God among the people. And the place where Shekinah dwells was called IMBA YECHIRANGANO — the House of the Covenant. And every land upon which this House rests is called RANGA.
verses.content_sn: Pakutanga, Mwari akasarudza kugara pakati pevanhu, kwete mumatombo chete, asi mumiviri iri mipenyu. Kugara uku kwakanzi SHEKINAH, kuvapo kweRuva kwaMwari mupenyu pakati pevanhu. Nzvimbo inogara Shekinah yakanzi IMBA YECHIRANGANO. Uye nyika dzose panosendwa Imba iyi dzinonzi RANGA.

verses.title: THE HOUSE OF THE VIRGINS
verses.content: This House of God is formed of women who offered themselves without being married, a holy sacrifice. Therefore it is called Imba yeMhandara dzeDenga — the House of the Virgins of Heaven. This House is likened to AMAI MARIA, who carried and gave birth to JESU. And the dedication of these Mothers is a great prayer, which delivers the whole earth. These Mothers do not pray for Zimbabwe alone, nor for Kenya alone, but they are AMAI VEPASI ROSE — the Mothers of the whole world.
verses.content_sn: Imba yaMwari iyi inogadzirwa naAmai vakazvipira kusarorwa, chibayiro chitsvene. Saka inonzi Imba yeMhandara dzeDenga. Imba iyi inofananidzwa naAMAI MARIA, vakatakura vakasunungura JESU. Uye kuzvipira kwaAmai ava munamato mukuru, unonunura pasi rose. Amai ava havanamata veZimbabwe chete, kana veKenya chete, asi ndivo AMAI VEPASI ROSE.

verses.title: RANGA ON EARTH
verses.content: In this age there exists RANGA in Nairobi, Kenya, and there exists also RANGA in Hatfield, Harare, Zimbabwe. Yet when RANGA is spoken of most times, it refers to KENYA, because it is there that BABA JOHANI last dwelt, and from there he departed to ZAMBIA, where he died in NDOLA on the 13th day of September, 1973.
verses.content_sn: Panguva ino pane RANGA kuNairobi, Kenya, uyezve pane RANGA kuHatfield, Harare, Zimbabwe. Asi nguva zhinji kana tichitaura RANGA tinoreva KENYA, nekuti ndiko kwakagara Baba Johani pakupedzisira, uye kubva ipapo vakaenda kuZAMBIA, kwavakafira kuNDOLA musi wa13 September, 1973.

verses.title: SHEKINAH, EVE, AND MOTHER EARTH
verses.content: SHEKINAH is likened to EVE. And EVE is IVHU — the Earth. All humanity are children of the Earth, children of IVHU, children of EVE, for our bodies come from the Mother, from the WOMB, from the one who forms life within herself.
verses.content_sn: SHEKINAH inofananidzwa naEVE. EVE ndiko kuti IVHU — Nyika. Vanhu vose vana veNyika, vana veIVHU, vana vaEVE, nekuti mitumbi yedu inobva kuna Amai, kunzvimbo yekubereka, kune uyo anogadzira upenyu mukati make.

verses.title: THE MISSION OF BABA JOHANI
verses.content: And Baba Johani declared, saying: 'Ndauya kuzo dzorera EVE pachigaro chake.' For he saw that humanity had stopped honoring MOTHER EARTH, desiring only heaven, and saying the earth should be destroyed by fire. But Baba Johani said: 'Ndakaona pasi raitwa idzva; EVE adzorerwa pachigaro chake.'
verses.content_sn: Baba Johani vakataura vachiti: 'Ndauya kuzo dzorera EVE pachigaro chake.' Nokuti vakaona kuti vanhu vakanga vasisakoshesi AMAI NYIKA, vachingoda denga chete, vachiti nyika ngaiparadzwe nemoto. Asi Baba Johani vakati: 'Ndakaona pasi raitwa idzva; EVE adzorerwa pachigaro chake.'

verses.title: THE TWO COURTS - MODERN SANHEDRIN
verses.content: When Baba Johani departed from the earth, he left two courts, which together form the SANHEDRIN of today.
verses.content_sn: Baba Johani pavakaenda panyika, vakasiya matare maviri, anogadzira SANHEDRIN yanhasi.

verses.title: THE FIRST COURT - DARE RA JAKOPO (DARE RE JEEP)
verses.content: The first court is called DARE RA JAKOPO, also known as DARE RE JEEP. The name 'JEEP' was not a heavenly name, but a nickname, for these elders traveled by Jeep during Baba Johani's time. This court consists of seven men, appointed by Baba Johani. When some died, others were appointed in their place. And even today, when one dies, another is appointed. This court is presently in Zimbabwe. And Baba Johani declared that this court would judge all matters concerning the Church of JOHANI MASOWE.
verses.content_sn: Dare rekutanga rinonzi DARE RA JAKOPO, rinozivikanwawo saDARE RE JEEP. Zita rekuti 'JEEP' rakanga risiri zita rekudenga, asi nickname, nekuti vakuru ava vaifamba neJeep munguva yaBaba Johani. Dare iri rine varume vanomwe, vakagadzwa naBaba Johani. Kana vamwe vakafa, vamwe vanogadzwa panzvimbo yavo. Nanhasi kana mumwe akafa, mumwe anogadzwa. Dare iri parizvino riri kuZimbabwe. Baba Johani vakataura kuti dare iri rinotonga nyaya dzose dzesangano raJOHANI MASOWE.

verses.title: THE NAME OF THE CHURCH
verses.content: The name of the Church is: IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA, also known as GOSPEL OF GOD CHURCH, but truly it is JOHANI MASOWE.
verses.content_sn: Zita resangano nderekuti: IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA, rinozivikanwawo seGOSPEL OF GOD CHURCH, asi chaizvo ndiJOHANI MASOWE.

verses.title: THE SECOND COURT - DARE RA PETROS (PETER)
verses.content: The second court is called DARE RA PETROS, also called PETER. This court consists of twelve men, appointed by Baba Johani. These walked with Baba Johani continually. This court is called Dare reMativi Mana, meaning they walk to the four corners of the earth, performing the work of God. As with the first court, when some died, others were appointed. And this continues to this day. This court resides in KENYA at RANGA. They are the custodians of the House of God, watching over the Shekinah, ensuring it is sustained, and carrying it according to the order left by Baba Johani.
verses.content_sn: Dare rechipiri rinonzi DARE RA PETROS, rinodaidzwawo saPETER. Dare iri rine varume gumi nevaviri, vakagadzwa naBaba Johani. Ava vaifamba naBaba Johani nguva dzose. Dare iri rinonzi Dare reMativi Mana, kureva kuti vanofamba kumativi mana enyika, vachiita basa raMwari. Sezvakaitwawo nedare rekutanga, kana vamwe vakafa, vamwe vanogadzwa. Izvi zvinoenderera kusvika nhasi. Dare iri rinogara kuKENYA paRANGA. Ndivo vanochengeta Imba yaMwari, vachitarisa Shekinah, vachiona kuti inogara, uye vachitakura maererano nemurairo wakasiyiwa naBaba Johani.

verses.title: THE SEVEN NATIONS JOURNEY
verses.content: Baba Johani said: 'Nyika dzandaifanira kusvika handichasvika. Asi imi, IMBA YA MWARI ne DARE RA PETROS, muchaenda.' And he commanded that the House of God and the Court of Peter go to seven nations: Germany, America, Britain, Ethiopia, Israel, India, Australia.
verses.content_sn: Baba Johani vakati: 'Nyika dzandaifanira kusvika handichasvika. Asi imi, IMBA YA MWARI ne DARE RA PETROS, muchaenda.' Vakarayira kuti Imba yaMwari neDare raPetros vaende kunyika nomwe: Germany, America, Britain, Ethiopia, Israel, India, Australia.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO GERMANY
verses.content: To GERMANY: To pray for the spirits of those killed in the wars of Hitler.
verses.content_sn: KuGERMANY: Kunamatira mweya yevanhu vakaurayiwa muhondo yaHitler.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO AMERICA
verses.content: To AMERICA: To pray for the release of the spirit of AMERIGO VESPUCCI, a prince. For there exists a hidden history, not known to many, which is spoken by ABASID 1841.
verses.content_sn: KuAMERICA: Kunamatira kusungunurwa kwemweya waAMERIGO VESPUCCI, muchinda. Nokuti pane nhoroondo yakavanzika, isingazivikanwi nevazhinji, inotaurwa naABASID 1841.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO BRITAIN
verses.content: To BRITAIN: To follow the belongings of Baba Johani, namely the GAMENZI and the TSVIMBO, which were taken by white people and placed in a Museum in Britain.
verses.content_sn: KuBRITAIN: Kutevera nhumbi dzaBaba Johani, dzinova GAMENZI neTSVIMBO, dzakatorwa nevanhu vachena dzikaiswa muMuseum kuBritain.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO ETHIOPIA AND THE RING OF SOLOMON
verses.content: To ETHIOPIA: To retrieve the power of the RING OF SOLOMON. This ring was with MENELIK, son of SOLOMON and the QUEEN OF SHEBA. MENELIK was buried with it at MOUNT KILIMANJARO. THE WORK OF THE RING: To raise the dead. To conquer death. To serve as the sign of marriage between Heaven and Earth, between God and Humanity, between Flesh and Spirit. This Ring today is carried by ABASID 1841, who is the one who died and rose again, the MHONDORO of JUDAH.
verses.content_sn: KuETHIOPIA: Kutora simba reMHETE YASOLOMON. Mhete iyi yakanga inaMENELIK, mwana waSOLOMON naMAMBO KADZI WESHEBA. MENELIK akavigwa nayo paGOMO REKILIMANJARO. BASA REMHETE: Kumutsa vakafa. Kukunda rufu. Kuva chiratidzo chemuchato pakati peDenga neNyika, pakati paMwari nevanhu, pakati penyama nemweya. Mhete iyi nhasi inotakurwa naABASID 1841, anova ndiye akafa akamuka, MHONDORO YEKWA JUDAH.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO ISRAEL
verses.content: To ISRAEL: To walk upon holy ground and graves of the righteous. Yet ABASID 1841 declares that the journey to Israel holds a greater secret than is known.
verses.content_sn: KuISRAEL: Kutsika nzvimbo tsvene nemakuva evakarurama. Asi ABASID 1841 anotaura kuti rwendo rwekuIsrael rune chakavanzika chikuru kupfuura zvinozivikanwa.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO AUSTRALIA
verses.content: To AUSTRALIA: Because Australia lies upon the CAPRICORN LINE, the line upon which the MESSIAH is born.
verses.content_sn: KuAUSTRALIA: Nekuti Australia iri paMUTSETSE WECAPRICORN, mutsetse panoberekwa MESSIAH.

verses.title: THE MISSION TO INDIA AND THE SIDHI PEOPLE
verses.content: To INDIA: To spread the Gospel among the HINDU KUSH, especially the SIDHI, who came from ZIMBABWE long ago. The SIDHI are counted among the lineage of ABASID 1841. They are descended from Bantu peoples of Africa, who traveled as merchants, sailors, warriors, and servants.
verses.content_sn: KuINDIA: Kuparidza Vhangeri pakati peHINDU KUSH, kunyanya vaSIDHI, vakabva kuZIMBABWE kare kare. VaSIDHI vanoverengwa mudzinza raABASID 1841. Vanobva kuvanhu veBantu veAfrica, vakafamba sevashambadziri, vasori, varwi, nevashandi.

verses.title: THE NAME SEALED
verses.content: This Gospel is named: GOSPEL OF GOD – IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA. It is the voice of the Earth restored. It is the return of EVE to her throne. It is the dwelling of God among humanity. The Two Courts stand. The House stands. The Ring is carried. The Seven Nations are sealed.
verses.content_sn: Vhangeri iri rinonzi: GOSPEL OF GOD – IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA. Ndiwo manzwi eNyika adzorwa. Ndiko kudzoka kwaEVE pachigaro chake. Ndiko kugara kwaMwari pakati pevanhu. Matare maviri amire. Imba yamire. Mhete inotakurwa. Nyika nomwe dzakasimbiswa.

verses.title: CLOSING SEAL
verses.content: He who has ears, let him hear. He who seeks, let him ask the Throne. For the dwelling of God is now with humanity. AMEN. SEAL OF THE THRONE: The Two Lions are on the Throne. God's dwelling is now on Earth.
verses.content_sn: Ane nzeve dzekunzwa ngaanzwe. Anotsvaka ngabvunze Chigaro cheUshe. Nokuti kugara kwaMwari kwava pakati pevanhu. AMENI. CHISIMBISO CHECHIGARO: Shumba mbiri dziri paChigaro. Kugara kwaMwari kwava paNyika.

verses.title: WHAT IS RANGA
verses.content: RANGA is any land upon which the IMBA YECHIRANGANO (House of the Covenant) dwells. It is the earthly domain of the SHEKINAH. Active RANGA locations today: Nairobi, Kenya and Hatfield, Harare, Zimbabwe. Primary Reference RANGA: Kenya — because it was the final dwelling place of Baba Johani before his death in Ndola, Zambia (13 September 1973).
verses.content_sn: RANGA inzvimbo yose inogara IMBA YECHIRANGANO. Ndiyo nyika yepasi yeSHEKINAH. Nzvimbo dzeRANGA nhasi: Nairobi, Kenya neHatfield, Harare, Zimbabwe. RANGA huru: Kenya — nekuti ndiyo yakagara Baba Johani pakupedzisira asati afa kuNdola, Zambia (13 September 1973).

verses.title: WHO IS ABASID 1841
verses.content: ABASID 1841 is the Living Seal and Bearer. He is the Carrier of the Ring of Solomon. He is Mufandichimuka (He who died and rose). He is the Mhondoro of Judah. He reveals the hidden history of America, the deeper secret of Israel, and speaks for the lineage of the SIDHI.
verses.content_sn: ABASID 1841 ndiye Chisimbiso Chipenyu noMutakuri. Ndiye anotakura Mhete yaSolomon. Ndiye Mufandichimuka. Ndiye Mhondoro yekwaJudah. Anoratidzira nhoroondo yakavanzika yeAmerica, chakavanzika chikuru cheIsrael, uye anotaurira dzinza revaSIDHI.

verses.title: THE RING OF SOLOMON
verses.content: The Ring of Solomon was once with Menelik (son of Solomon and Queen of Sheba), buried with him at Kilimanjaro. Its functions: To raise the dead. To conquer death. To be the sign of marriage between Heaven and Earth, between God and His people, between flesh and spirit. The current bearer is ABASID 1841.
verses.content_sn: Mhete yaSolomon yakanga inaMenelik (mwana waSolomon naQueen of Sheba), akavigwa nayo paKilimanjaro. Mabasa ayo: Kumutsa vakafa. Kukunda rufu. Kuva chiratidzo chemuchato weDenga neNyika, waMwari nevanhu vake, wenyama nemweya. Anotakura nhasi ndiABASID 1841.

verses.title: BABA JOHANI DEATH RECORD
verses.content: Baba Johani's final dwelling was at RANGA, Kenya. He departed and died in Ndola, Zambia on the 13th day of September, 1973. He established the Modern Sanhedrin through the two courts: Dare ra Jakopo (7 men, Zimbabwe) and Dare ra Petros (12 men, Kenya).
verses.content_sn: Baba Johani vakagara pakupedzisira paRANGA, Kenya. Vakaenda vakafira kuNdola, Zambia musi wa13 September, 1973. Vakamisa Sanhedrin yemazuva ano nematare maviri: Dare raJakopo (varume 7, Zimbabwe) neDare raPetros (varume 12, Kenya).

verses.title: THE SIDHI PEOPLE
verses.content: The Siddhi (or Siddi) are a unique ethnic group in India and Pakistan who are primarily descended from the Bantu peoples of Southeast Africa. They arrived on the Indian subcontinent over centuries, mostly through the Indian Ocean slave trade, but also as merchants, sailors, and mercenaries. Their ancestors were largely from the Bantu-speaking peoples of East and Southeast Africa (from the Zanj coast, modern-day Botswana, Zimbabwe, and Kenya). They are counted to the lineage of ABASID 1841.
verses.content_sn: VaSidhi (kana Siddi) irudzi rwevanhu runosarudza muIndia nePakistan vanobva kuvanhu veBantu veSoutheast Africa. Vakasvika kuIndian subcontinent makore mazhinji, kuburikidza nekutengesa varanda, kuvawo vashambadziri, vasori, nevarwi. Madziteteguru avo akabva kuvanhu vanotaura chiBantu vekuEast neSoutheast Africa (kubva kuZanj coast, Botswana, Zimbabwe, neKenya yanhasi). Vanoverengwa mudzinza raABASID 1841.
